name: Quick Pots De Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk to boiling point.
2. Place egg, rum, chocolate bits, sugar, and a pinch of salt in an electric blender.
3. Add hot milk to the blender and blend at low speed for one minute.
4. Stir with a rubber spatula to remove any bubbles.
5. Pour the mixture into pot de creme cups.
6. Chill several hours before serving.
